flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Alabama in Huntsville rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($23.9k → $26.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Alabama in Huntsville fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (7.4k → 6.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Alabama in Huntsville fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Alabama in Huntsville are 37% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($61.8k vs $45.2k).
